name: Hominy Grits
recipeInstructions:
1. Add salt to the hominy grits.
2. Gradually pour in 5 cups of boiling water, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 25 to 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Serve with gravy or with butter. Optionally, add cream and sugar.
5. Chill leftovers, slice them, and fry in butter until golden brown.
